summary: Classified five open PR inventory items independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and no close/merge/fix action is safe or permitted from this inventory shard.

actions.reason: Broad feature PR with failed proof and no hydrated duplicate or superseding canonical; keep it independent for normal maintainer review rather than closing or merging from inventory.
